title: Go Practice 001
description: Build a simple English sentence step by step with time, place, and want to.

stages.title: Step 1
stages.selectionAdvice: Start with the subject and verb.
stages.completionAdvice: Basic sentence done. Add the place next.

distractorBlocks.advice: The place comes later.
Use go, not come.

ja.text: 私は行きます。

stages.title: Step 2
stages.selectionAdvice: Add the verb, then the place.
stages.completionAdvice: Place done. Add time next.

distractorBlocks.advice: Use the target place for this sentence.
Use go, not come.

ja.text: 私は学校に行きます。

stages.title: Step 3
stages.selectionAdvice: Add the time expression last.
stages.completionAdvice: Time done. Add want to next.

distractorBlocks.advice: Use the target time expression here.
Use the target place for this sentence.

ja.text: 今日は私は学校に行きます。

stages.title: Step 4
stages.goal: I want to go to school today.
stages.selectionAdvice: Add the time expression last.
stages.completionAdvice: This sentence is complete.

distractorBlocks.advice: Use want to go for this step.
Use go, not come.

en.text: I want to go to school.today.

ja.text: 今日は私は学校に行きたいです。
